title: AutoUnArmorX
description: Automatically unequips armor pieces when they reach 1 durability to prevent them from breaking. 100% client-side and works on any server.
body:
🛡️ Auto UnArmor (Client)

Version: 1.0.0 — Fabric 1.21.9

Description

Stop breaking your favorite armor pieces by accident!
Auto UnArmor (Client) automatically unequips your armor before it breaks — keeping it safe in your inventory instead of letting it vanish forever. It’s completely client-side, so you can use it on any server without needing server mods or permissions.

✨ Features

🧤 Automatically unequips armor pieces when they drop to 3 durability or less

🔁 Detects if you manually re-equip low-durability armor — and won’t remove it again until repaired

⚙️ 100% client-side, works seamlessly on vanilla, modded, and multiplayer servers

⚡ Lightweight & optimized — runs smoothly every few ticks with no packet spam

🎨 Includes clean metadata and icon support for Mod Menu

💎 Perfect for Hardcore, PvP, and long survival runs where every item matters

🧱 Requirements

Fabric Loader: 0.17.3+

Minecraft: 1.21.9 (also compatible with 1.21.10)

Fabric API: Latest for 1.21.9

📦 Optional Mods (Recommended)

Mod Menu – to view the mod icon and description in-game

YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL) – for future settings like durability thresholds or toggles
